announcement.text: Stay with BornoSoft — CampusFlow is growing for you.

trust.title: Numbers that speak for themselves

features.title: Everything you need to succeed
features.subtitle: From assignment covers to interview prep — one platform for your entire academic journey.

assignment.desc: Generate official DIU assignment covers in seconds with auto-filled student profiles.

diu.title: Official DIU Formats

oneClick.title: One-Click Generation
oneClick.desc: Generate PDFs instantly with auto-saved student profile data.

profiles.title: Auto-Saved Profiles
profiles.desc: Your details are saved automatically — never re-enter info.

ats.title: ATS-Friendly CV
ats.desc: Build CVs optimized for applicant tracking systems.

workflow.title: Fast Academic Workflow
workflow.desc: From cover to submission in under 60 seconds.

interactive.title: Interactive CS Tools

mobile.title: Mobile Responsive
mobile.desc: Full functionality on desktop, tablet, and phone.

learning.title: Master CS topics interactively
learning.subtitle: Explore 13+ subjects with simulators, lessons, exams, and progress tracking.

career.title: Launch your tech career

devtools.title: 100+ developer utilities
devtools.subtitle: JSON, CSS, Tailwind, images, encoding, colors, and more — all in your browser.

testimonials.title: Loved by students
testimonials.subtitle: See what CSE and SWE students across Bangladesh are saying.

items.name: Rahim Ahmed
items.text: CampusFlow saved me hours every week. Assignment covers and lab reports are now one click away.

items.name: Fatima Khan
items.text: The Interview Hub helped me prepare for my first tech interview. The company-specific questions are gold.

items.name: Tanvir Hassan
items.text: Best free platform for CS students in Bangladesh. The learning tools and dev utilities are incredible.

pricing.title: Free forever for students
